transcript: G'day there Drink Buddies! Scotty Boxa here for www.drinklab.org and yes today another cocktail and I'll be showing you how to make Midori Illusion. It's a favorite by many, it's a favorite on our website. Thousands of you have requested a video on how to and here it is the Midori We'll be right back. you how to make Midori Illusion. It's a favourite by many, it's a favourite on our website, thousands of you have requested a video on how to, and here it is, the Midori Illusion. For the Midori Illusion you will need two ounces of melon liqueur, half an ounce of vodka, half an ounce of triple sec or Cointreau, two ounces of pineapple juice and one ounce of lemon juice. In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, pour in your melon liqueur, then your vodka, triple sec, then add your pineapple juice, and lemon juice. Put the lid on the shaker and shake away. Give that a good shake and then strain over ice into your glass the Midori illusion cheers if you want to check out all the details on how to make this recipe and thousands of others head on over to our website www.drinklab.org. If you like this video then don't forget to give it a thumbs up and subscribe to our YouTube channel. Follow us on Facebook, Twitter, Pinterest or Instagram and check out our other videos down below don't forget our website is drinklab.org for directions and thousands of other cocktail recipes
